palette: Dusty gold, charcoal, and oxidized zinc (the colors of Montmartre rooftops and twilight).
lighting: Golden hour haze. Low-angle sunlight catching the steam from a cafe vent. Deep blue shadows in the narrow alleys.
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. A narrow, wet cobblestone street in Montmartre at dusk. The stones glisten like mirrors, reflecting the warm yellow glow of a nearby bistro window. Old wrought iron railings in the foreground. Dusty gold light hitting the peeling plaster of a corner building. No people. World is impossibly large. No text or overlays.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. Interior of a dimly lit, historic Parisian cafe. A small round marble table with a single half-empty espresso cup. A vintage film camera (Bolex style) sits on the chair next to it. Harsh golden sunlight streaming through a lace-curtained window, illuminating floating dust motes. World is impossibly large. No text or overlays.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. Extreme close-up on the intricate, rusted patterns of a Montmartre garden gate. Beyond the bars, a blurred view of a lush green garden and the white domes of the Sacré-Cœur in the distance, bathed in the last gold rays of the sun. Oxidized zinc textures. World is impossibly large. No text or overlays.
